# Executive Angler

> The definitive fly fishing resource — destinations, rivers, lodges, guides, species, and expert instruction from around the world.

## About

Executive Angler is a comprehensive fly fishing resource website designed to be the single authoritative source for anglers worldwide. We cover every major fly fishing destination, river, lodge, guide service, fly shop, and fish species on earth. Our editorial content includes in-depth technique articles, species guides, gear reviews, and conservation coverage.

We do not sell gear or operate as a booking agent. We connect anglers directly with lodges and guides — no middleman.

## Content Types

### Destinations
Geographic regions organized by continent, country, and state/province. Each destination page includes an overview, best fishing months, target species, available waters, nearby lodges and guides, and interactive maps.

Current destinations span 25 locations worldwide including: Montana, Wyoming, Colorado, Idaho, Alaska, Oregon, Pennsylvania, Michigan, Arkansas, Florida Keys, New Zealand, Patagonia, British Columbia, Bahamas, Iceland, Chile, Belize, Scotland, Slovenia, Japan, Christmas Island, Seychelles, Tasmania, Kamchatka, Tierra del Fuego.

### Rivers & Waters
Individual fly fishing waters with detailed information including species present, best months, flow type (freestone/tailwater/spring creek/saltwater flat), access points with GPS coordinates, regulations, hatch charts, and interactive Mapbox maps. Over 55 rivers and waters worldwide.

Featured rivers: Madison River, Gallatin River, Yellowstone River, Missouri River, Big Hole River, Deschutes River, Henry's Fork, Snake River, South Platte, White River, and many more.

### Lodges
Fly fishing lodges and outfitters worldwide. Each listing includes location, pricing, season dates, capacity, amenities, photo galleries, community photos, and direct booking links to the lodge's official website. Over 25 lodges across all destinations.

### Guides
Professional fly fishing guide services. Profiles include specialties, years of experience, daily rates, rivers covered, and direct contact information. Over 25 guide services worldwide.

### Fly Shops
Local fly shops with services, hours, brands carried, and contact information. Shops are linked to their local waters and destinations. Over 25 fly shops worldwide.

### Species
Comprehensive fish species reference with 35+ species profiles. Each species page includes taxonomy, description, habitat, diet, spawning behavior, conservation status, distribution maps, recommended fly patterns, tackle recommendations, and fun facts. Species are categorized by family: Trout, Salmon, Char, Grayling, Saltwater, Warmwater, and Pike.

### Articles
Long-form editorial content organized by category:
- Techniques (Euro nymphing, tenkara, streamer fishing, dry fly, saltwater)
- Destination guides (Patagonia, Iceland, etc.)
- Gear reviews and recommendations (fly rods, essential fly patterns)
- Conservation and stewardship (wild trout, catch and release)
- Species guides (trout identification, species behavior)
- Culture (women in fly fishing, photography)

### Community Photos
Users can submit their fishing photos to any destination, river, lodge, guide, fly shop, or species page. Photos are reviewed by admins before appearing in the community gallery. Each photo can include camera settings (body, lens, aperture, shutter speed, ISO) and captions.

## Key Pages

- / — Homepage with featured destinations, lodges, rivers, species, and articles
- /destinations — Browse all 25 fly fishing destinations
- /destinations/montana — Montana fly fishing guide (showcase destination)
- /rivers — Browse all 55+ rivers and waters
- /rivers/madison-river — Madison River complete guide with map and hatch chart
- /lodges — Browse fly fishing lodges
- /species — Browse all fish species with family filtering
- /species/rainbow-trout — Rainbow Trout species profile with distribution map
- /articles — Read expert articles and instruction
- /articles/introduction-to-euro-nymphing — Comprehensive euro nymphing guide
- /guides — Find fly fishing guides
- /fly-shops — Find local fly shops

## Technical Details

- Built with Next.js 16, hosted on Vercel
- Interactive maps powered by Mapbox GL JS
- Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL)
- Schema.org structured data on all entity pages
- Dynamic sitemap at /sitemap.xml
- User authentication via Supabase Auth
- Photo submissions with admin approval workflow
- Google Reviews integration for lodges, guides, and fly shops

## Contact

Website: https://executiveangler.com
